name: Tortilla Beef Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Roast beef; rare, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread about 2 tablespoons of the horseradish dip on one side of each flour tortilla.
2. Place 1 or 2 slices of roast beef on top of the dip on each tortilla.
3. Spread another 2 tablespoons of the horseradish dip over the beef.
4. Add lettuce leaves to each tortilla.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly in a jelly-roll shape, with the seam side down.
6. Place the rolled-up tortillas on a platter and cover.
7. Chill until serving time.
8. Before serving, cut each roll-up crosswise into thirds.
Makes 6 servings (2 roll-ups each).
